## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

```python
# Minimal code that triggers the bug
```

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happens (include the full traceback if applicable).

## Environment

- PyWatson version: <!-- e.g. 0.0.1 or `uv run pywatson --version` -->
- Python version: <!-- e.g. 3.12.4 -->
- OS: <!-- e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04 -->

## Additional context

Any other context, screenshots, or data files that help reproduce the issue.
